_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Valkey 9
author: admin@lavafuse.net
description: Valkey is an open-source in-memory key–value database, used as a distributed cache and message broker, with optional durability. Because it holds all data in memory and because of its design, Valkey offers low-latency reads and writes, making it particularly suitable for use cases that require a cache.

installation.script:
apk update
apk add --no-cache curl

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ ! -d /mnt/server/valkey.conf ]; then
    curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lavafuse/pterodactyl-eggs/refs/heads/main/valkey/9/valkey.conf -o valkey.conf
fi

echo -e "install complete"
exit 0

variables.name: Valkey Password
variables.description: The password valkey should use to secure the server.
